summary: TWO_COLUMN: LEFT a 14x14 MNIST-style digit-3 pixel grid built as a VGroup of Squares with fill_opacity = pixel intensity. RIGHT a vertical column of 14 BLUE Circle input neurons (...), with vertical dots above and below indicating the full a^(0) ∈ R^196 input vector. Nine YELLOW Arrows (GrowArrow) shoot from sampled pixels to their matching neurons, simultaneously setting each neuron's fill_opacity to the pixel value. YELLOW caption: 'each pixel intensity in [0,1] becomes one activation.'
